primary_display.name: ChaiGothic
primary_display.ownership: custom typeface bearing the brand name — proprietary; not in Google Fonts; loaded as a custom @font-face declaration. Brand-owned; do not redistribute. For ports, substitute Pretendard 700/500/400.
primary_display.fallback_recommended: Pretendard, -apple-system, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', system-ui, sans-serif

secondary_display.name: Gotham
secondary_display.role: Latin display secondary (mid-size headlines, ultra used for hero numbers)

modern_sans.name: Hauora
modern_sans.role: Modern sans for marketing supporting copy
modern_sans.ownership: Free for personal use; commercial license available

ui_sans.name: Inter
ui_sans.role: UI default sans where ChaiGothic is not needed

load_strategy: WebFont.load runtime injection (Google Fonts API) for Noto Sans KR; ChaiGothic / Gotham / Hauora ship via Webflow font upload (self-hosted)
stack_canonical: ChaiGothic, 'Noto Sans KR', Hauora, Inter, sans-serif
weight_rule: 700 leads the entire system (51% of declarations); 400 body; 600/500 minimal supporting; 900 reserved for ultra-emphasis numbers
